serverNeeds.description: Thread GSC clicks/impressions onto matching 404/ghost PageStatus rows (optional clicks/impressions fields) so the Redirects tab can show a real 404s/mo hits column.
serverNeeds.evidence: GSC ghost URLs fetched WITH clicks+impressions at server/routes/webflow-analysis.ts:203-214, but PageStatus (server/redirect-scanner.ts:37-48) has no hits fields — data is dropped inside scanRedirects.

serverNeeds.description: Serialize the existing keyword-overlap match score as PageStatus.matchScore, displayed as 'match %' (never 'AI'). Gated on owner picking Q3 option (b).
serverNeeds.evidence: findBestMatch computes bestScore internally (server/redirect-scanner.ts:146-160) but returns only the page; recommendedTarget/recommendedReason attach at :357-380 with no score.

serverNeeds.description: Persisted reviewed/suppressed state for dead links (N4 full version): store + POST toggle endpoint + serialization into link-check snapshot reads.
serverNeeds.evidence: grep 'suppress|reviewed' in server/link-checker.ts, server/performance-store.ts, src/components/LinkChecker.tsx returned zero matches; Links has no suppression store (Site Audit's is separate per parity ledger).

serverNeeds.description: Move the three synchronous long-GET scans (redirect-scan, link-check, internal-links) to the background-job platform; optional recurring crawl (N3). Defer-candidate, not a Phase-1 blocker.
serverNeeds.evidence: All three run inline in GET handlers (server/routes/webflow-analysis.ts:178,198,246); grep -i 'link|redirect|crawl' in server/cron-registry.ts returned no matches.

openQuestions.question: Q1: Redirect chains panel + all-pages status table + filters (#13-#15) have no prototype home — restore, move to Site Audit, or cut?
openQuestions.proposedDefault: Restore both as collapsed GroupBlock sections in the new Redirects tab; cutting breaks SeoAudit.tsx:550's 'review redirect chains' deep-link and deletes the platform's only chains UI.

openQuestions.question: Q2: carry Dead Links domain selector, 3xx sub-list, and CSV export (#35,#38,#39) into the rebuilt Dead tab?
openQuestions.proposedDefault: Carry all three — data/endpoints exist, domain selector prevents a solved false-404 regression, and export drops violate a hard floor.

openQuestions.question: Q3: mockup's 'AI 96%' confidence chip — drop, expose real heuristic score as 'match', or build AI scoring?
openQuestions.proposedDefault: (b) expose the heuristic bestScore labeled 'match' via sn-links-2; never ship a fabricated AI % (hard floor).

openQuestions.question: Q4: send-to-client shape — keep batched internal_link action + note, adopt per-suggestion sends (contract change), or both? Also: restore redirect_proposal send the prototype drops (#12)?
openQuestions.proposedDefault: Keep HEAD batch semantics and restore redirect send; per-item send deferred to a C3-style follow-up since it changes the payload consumed by decision-renderers + inbox routing.

openQuestions.question: Q5: confirm Architecture moves Page Intelligence → Links tab 4 with HEAD filter/search/schema-coverage/refresh carried; who owns removal from Page Intelligence?
openQuestions.proposedDefault: Confirm move; Links lane mounts it, SEO Editor/Page Intelligence lane owns removal in the same effort (D3 + route-removal checklist + D8 redirect map).

openQuestions.question: Q6: confirm Insert-link (N1) and links→insights bridge (N6) are post-parity roadmap, not Phase-1 blockers.
openQuestions.proposedDefault: Yes — both are new engineering (Webflow write path; bridge-authoring); defer with ledger rows.

openQuestions.question: Q7: prototype tab ids (dead vs HEAD dead-links) — alias approach?
openQuestions.proposedDefault: Keep HEAD ids and use tab-search-param.ts legacyAliases (mechanism already exists, line 4/27) so SeoAudit.tsx:536 and bookmarks keep working; no owner decision strictly needed.

kitNewFeatures.proposal: N1 Insert internal link directly into source page
kitNewFeatures.rationale: No write path exists; requires seo-editor-write-targets contract work — post-parity per Q6 default.
Hits are a small server field (sn-links-1) with real GSC data already fetched; confidence only as real 'match' score (Q3b, sn-links-2).
Needs background-job migration (sn-links-4); sync-GET parity is acceptable short-term with a DEF-* row.
Adopt with session-state quick win; persisted reviewed-state (sn-links-3) ships as ledgered follow-up.
Relocation not new code — API exists (site-architecture.ts:19,34); ratified by ledger 'moved' row, coordinate per Q5.
New integration under bridge-authoring rules; not parity work.

composition.statesPlan: Per-tab: EmptyState w/ first-scan CTA, contextual loading ('Analyzing page content…', long-crawl notice), ErrorState w/ retry, plus restored partial-fetch diagnostics (#32); no tier lock (admin surface, no TierGate at HEAD).
composition.mountNote: Rebuilt view replaces LinksPanel at Page 'links' behind ui-rebuild-shell; requires selected.webflowSiteId (App.tsx mount); must keep ?tab= receiver with dead-links legacy alias for SeoAudit deep-links.

seo-editor / Page Intelligence (D3): Architecture relocation N5 — Links gains tab 4, Page Intelligence loses SiteArchitecture; same-effort removal + D8 redirect map
client-portal / Inbox: internal_link + redirect_proposal renderers (decision-renderers.tsx:356,414) consume this surface's send payloads — Q4 governs any shape change
intelligence slices: site-health-slice + page-profile-slice + admin-chat-context read the three snapshots — snapshot shapes are a frozen contract

verdicts.evidence: server/redirect-scanner.ts:195-200 (GscGhostUrl carries clicks+impressions); ghost-merge loop server/redirect-scanner.ts:253-273 pushes only {url,path,title,source} — clicks/impressions dropped; PageStatus interface server/redirect-scanner.ts:38-48 has no hits fields. GSC fetch WITH clicks+impressions confirmed at server/routes/webflow-analysis.ts:205-217 (evidence cited 203-214, ~2-line drift, substantively correct).
verdicts.correction: Claim stands. Note: RedirectScanResult (incl. pageStatuses) persists as a JSON blob — server/redirect-store.ts:82-98 does result: JSON.stringify(result) and rowToSnapshot uses parseJsonFallback (redirect-store.ts:78) — so adding optional clicks/impressions to PageStatus needs NO migration/column/mapper lockstep. effort=S is correct; the DB-column-lockstep rule does not apply.

verdicts.evidence: findBestMatch computes bestScore internally (server/redirect-scanner.ts:156-192) but returns bestPage only (line 192 `return bestScore >= 3 ? bestPage : null`). recommendedTarget/recommendedReason attach at server/redirect-scanner.ts:368-380 with no numeric score field. Evidence cited 146-160/357-380 — accurate. PageStatus (38-48) has no matchScore field.
verdicts.correction: Claim stands. Same JSON-blob persistence as sn-links-1 (redirect-store.ts:78,97) — matchScore is a free optional field on PageStatus, no migration. effort=S correct. Owner Q3 option (b) gating is a policy note, not a code fact, and does not affect the exists-today verdict.

verdicts.evidence: rg -ni 'suppress|reviewed|dismiss|ignore|hide' returned ZERO matches in server/link-checker.ts, server/performance-store.ts, and src/components/LinkChecker.tsx (290 lines, no client-side suppression state either). Broad search rg -rni 'suppressed_links|dead_link.*suppress|link_suppress|reviewed_links|dismissed_link' across server/ + shared/ returned zero. Link-check persists via performance-store save('link-check',...) (performance-store.ts:348-350) as an opaque `unknown` blob — no reviewed/suppressed column or toggle endpoint anywhere.
verdicts.correction: Claim stands. No suppression store, no POST toggle endpoint, no serialization of reviewed/suppressed state exists for Links. Naming-drift synonyms (dismiss/ignore/hide) also checked and absent. effort=M is defensible (new store + endpoint + snapshot-read merge).

verdicts.evidence: All three scans run inline inside GET handlers: checkSiteLinks at server/routes/webflow-analysis.ts:182, scanRedirects at :222, analyzeInternalLinks at :250 (evidence cited 178/198/246 — modest line drift, substantively correct; each is awaited synchronously in the request handler, not dispatched to server/jobs.ts). rg -ni 'link|redirect|crawl' server/cron-registry.ts returned exit 1 / zero matches — no scheduled crawl registered.
verdicts.correction: Claim stands. kind=job and existsToday=no are correct; none of the three are wired into the background-job platform or cron-registry. Defer-candidate framing is a scope judgment, not a code fact.
